channel.title: Go on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Go on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Day 1: Secret Entrance
item.description: package main import ( "bufio" "fmt" "os" "strconv" ) type Simulation struct { Moves []int InitialPosition int TotalPositions int Target int } func main() { moves, err := ParseInstructionsFromFile("input.txt") if err != nil { fmt.Println("Failed to parse instructions: ", err) return } sim, err := NewSimulation(moves, 50, 100, 0) if err != nil { fmt.Println("Simulation could not be created:", err) return } result, err := sim.Run() if err != nil { fmt.
